description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a combination of gray and white exterior finishes. The front facade includes a double garage, a wide driveway, and a fenced yard area. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio with a swimming pool, and there is a fenced side yard for additional outdoor space. The main entryway is centrally located, with a prominent door and steps leading up from the driveway. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, fenced yard, and a rear patio with a swimming pool. The exterior is finished in gray and white, emphasizing a clean, contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway, driveway, and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced yard, side windows, and the start of the rear patio and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio, swimming pool, and extensive windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and additional windows, with the fenced yard visible on the far side.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with steps, no porch, minimal overhang, and a wide driveway leading to a double garage
